{{Quote|Prepare to move out. But don't forget to bring my imager!|Lesim|<ref name="Capture" />}}
'''Lesim''' was an [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[Major/Legends|major]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Stationed aboard an [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]] that was patrolling the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Lesim encountered [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], who surrendered [[Gender/Legends|himself]] to the major and his [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] with the request to be delivered to the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]]. Believing he would earn a promotion to [[General/Legends|general]] for capturing the famous Rebel, Lesim hoped to have a [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] taken with Skywalker before bringing him to Vader.

==Biography==
{{Quote|You know who this is? Luke Skywalker. I've seen his face in Intelligence files. Soldiers, you have made a very lucky catch. I'll be made general for this.|Lesim|<ref name="Capture" />}}
Lesim served as an [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] against the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. He attained the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Major/Legends|major]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] by<ref name="Capture" /> [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], during the early stages of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Lesim was stationed in [[Commanding officer/Legends|command]] of a group of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] aboard an [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]] [[Walker/Legends|walker]] that was patrolling the [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]]. Lesim's stormtroopers were approached by Rebel Alliance [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], who willingly turned himself in with the intention of being delivered to the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] while on the moon. Skywalker used a [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]] with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to persuade the [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] to deliver him to their commanding [[Officer/Legends|officer]], and the Imperial [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] escorted the Rebel to Lesim via the walker's [[Transport/Legends|transport]] section, with his confiscated [[Luke Skywalker's green lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] presented to the major.<ref name="Capture" />

[[File:Igar_and_Vader.png|thumb|left|200px|Luke Skywalker, Major Lesim's captive, being escorted by Commander Igar to Darth Vader]]
Peering at his captive intently for several moments, Lesim announced that he recognized Skywalker's face from [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] files and believed that he would be promoted to [[General/Legends|general]] for capturing the famous Rebel. He ordered one of his men, [[Arno (stormtrooper)|Arno]], to bring him his [[imager]] so that he and Skywalker could have a [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] taken with each other. Lesim complied with Skywalker's Force-persuasion to bring him to Vader, but the major still requested to have the hologram taken with his [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] first.<ref name="Capture" /> Ultimately, another Imperial officer, Commander [[Igar/Legends|Igar]], personally delivered Skywalker to [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Vader on Endor.<ref name="RotJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref> The story of Skywalker's capture on Endor was later compiled by Alliance [[Historian/Legends|historian]] [[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]] from reports that Na'al gleaned from both Skywalker and captured Imperial troops after the Battle of Endor.<ref name="Capture" />

==Behind the scenes==
Lesim was created for the short story ''[[The Capture of Luke Skywalker]]'', published as part of the [[1990]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook ''[[Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi]]'' and written by [[Michael Stern]].<ref name="Capture original">{{WEGCite|story=The Capture of Luke Skywalker|book=Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi|reprint=1}}</ref>
